title: chamaecrista glandulosa var. pinetorum
intro: Chamaecrista glandulosa var. pinetorum, also known as the pine needle bush or yellow flower, is a plant species in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Chamaecrista glandulosa var. pinetorum is typically used as a tea, infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
